description: This file defines a React functional component 'RecipeForm' for creating and editing recipe data within a culinary web application. It manages form state, handles input changes, and renders input fields including ingredients and steps, with options to add and remove elements.

methods.name: RecipeForm
methods.description: React component for creating/editing recipes with controlled form inputs, managing recipe draft state, and providing UI elements for recipe attributes, ingredients, and preparation steps.

methods.name: parseTags
methods.description: Parses a comma-separated string into an array of trimmed tags.

methods.name: tagsToString
methods.description: Converts an array of tags into a comma-separated string for display.
